name: ASRock B860 LIVEMIXER WIFI ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1851 - 1x PCIe 5.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x16 - Support DDR5-8666+(OC) - 3x M.2 Slots - Thunderbolt 4 Type-C - HDMI 2.1 - Dragon 2.5G LAN - Optical SPDIF Out - 802.11axe Wi-Fi 6E - Bluetooth 5.3
shortName: ASRock B860 LIVEMIXER WIFI ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1851 - 1x
description: ASRock B860 ATX motherboard with PCIe 5.0, DDR5 support, and Wi-Fi 6E for Intel LGA 1851 systems.
